title: Logout
overview: Pratyush, a social media influencer who is about to reach his biggest milestone in terms of followers to land a deal with a brand, loses his phone to a fan obsessed with him. Trapped in his own house without his phone, Pratyush must find a way to reclaim his identity and his career.

trailers.title: Logout | Official Trailer | A ZEE5 Original Film | Babil Khan | Premieres 18th April on ZEE5
